markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and prepare for an upcoming workshop on using AI tools like Anthropic for content creation and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The workshop will focus on demonstrating how to use AI prompts to generate content ideas, outlines, and drafts for SEO articles](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Marcel will show the full workflow from ideation to keyword research to draft creation, but may hold back on some proprietary "adapter" workflows](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [There will be a mix of new and returning attendees, with varying levels of SEO/marketing experience](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
  - [The goal is to provide enough value for $300 tickets while not giving away all trade secrets](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)

## Topics

### Workshop Content Plan

  - [Start with a simple prompt to describe a role and have AI expand on it](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Build out a full list of 100 article topics, keywords, user questions etc. for that role](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Demonstrate the keyword gap analysis process in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Potentially adapt one of their existing AI workflows live during the workshop](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Focus more on playing with prompts vs. showing full proprietary workflows](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Attendee Profile

  - [Around 90 registrants so far, mostly individuals looking to learn rather than businesses](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [A few potentially high-value attendees like newsletter owners and former big tech employees](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Mostly new or inexperienced with SEO/marketing based on domains](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Pricing Strategy

  - [$300 pricing seen as a good balance of being affordable while still valuing the content](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Previous $1000 pricing was too high, especially for a single session](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Goal is to cover promotion costs while leaving room for higher-priced offerings later](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Personal Updates

  - [Hiring a painter who is recovering from cancer](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Discussing engagement ring costs and sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to remove any proprietary "adapter" workflows from the shared Anthropic instance](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Potentially demonstrate the Zapier/Airtable integration if there is interest](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Be prepared to adjust depth of content based on audience experience level](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)
  - [Follow up on scheduling any remaining kickoff calls for next week](https://fathom.video/share/RDeFKWpgs9N9mVmrVUvUBRF1d6Uz3ct5?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
